ns0:entry.ns0:title: MHSanaei/3x-ui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MHSanaei/3x-ui
Language: html
Xray panel supporting multi-protocol multi-user expire day & traffic & IP limit (Vmess, Vless, Trojan, ShadowSocks, Wireguard, Tunnel, Mixed, HTTP, Tun)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: f/prompts.chat
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/f/prompts.chat
Language: html
f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: github/opensource.guide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/github/opensource.guide
Language: html
📚 Community guides for open source creators

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lancedb/lancedb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lancedb/lancedb
Language: html
Developer-friendly OSS embedded retrieval library for multimodal AI. Search More; Manage Less.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: madhuakula/kubernetes-goat
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/madhuakula/kubernetes-goat
Language: html
Kubernetes Goat is a "Vulnerable by Design" cluster environment to learn and practice Kubernetes security using an interactive hands-on playground 🚀

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nibzard/awesome-agentic-patterns
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nibzard/awesome-agentic-patterns
Language: html
A curated catalogue of awesome agentic AI patterns

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nirholas/XActions
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nirholas/XActions
Language: html
⚡ The Complete X/Twitter Automation Toolkit — Scrapers, MCP server for AI agents (Claude/GPT), CLI, browser scripts. No API fees. Open source. Unfollow people who don't follow back. Monitor real-time analytics. Auto follow, like, comment, scrape, without API.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: web-platform-tests/wpt
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/web-platform-tests/wpt
Language: html
Test suites for Web platform specs — including WHATWG, W3C, and others

ns0:entry.ns0:title: windmill-labs/windmill
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/windmill-labs/windmill
Language: html
Open-source developer platform to power your entire infra and turn scripts into webhooks, workflows and UIs. Fastest workflow engine (13x vs Airflow). Open-source alternative to Retool and Temporal.
